data.body: Cross-ticket overlap epic (only-crave-art): ran 6 derisking experiments then remediated epic+7 children. Recall spike VALIDATED no-embeddings design (digest-BM25F recall@20=1.0 on 8 paraphrase pairs, stable 60->200; raw-BM25 decayed to 0.75). Latency 0.69ms@800 (no ANN). Enrichment ~1.90usd one-time/793 tickets. Manual write-lock (lock.acquire/txn.py) supports atomic cert+enqueue and race-free claim; _ticket_text is canonical hash normalizer; Windows detach needs os.name guard. v3 descriptions fold in all findings+evidence with consistent config split (tunables->LLMConfig, overlap_enabled->VerifyConfig+_SECTIONS), S3/S4 scope boundary, named payload schema+sentinel, per-AC proving commands.
